task_params.title: Conference Case Study Idea - Cultural Motifs in Prosthetic Aesthetics
task_params.content_brief: Draft a case-study concept document on blending cultural motifs with prosthetic aesthetics.
case_study_points: problem: prosthetics often prioritize function over personal identity
focus on integrating cultural motifs without reducing clinical usability
use examples from ocular and dental prosthetic design workflows
cover material, color-matching, and patient consultation considerations
note ethical boundary between personalization and stereotyping
outline possible before-and-after case narrative structure
include conference-ready sections: background, method, outcomes, discussion
